prompt: Create a glossy Chinese co-branded beverage poster advertisement in a bold commercial style, vertical 4:5 composition, with a dramatic split-color background: bright saturated red on the left and vivid royal blue on the right, blended at the center with radiant streaks, motion lines, glow effects, and high-energy product-launch lighting. At the top, place 2 brand logo areas separated by a white multiplication sign: on the upper left, a snowman mascot logo with Chinese text {argument name="left brand name" default="蜜雪冰城"} and smaller subtitle text "始于1997冰淇淋与茶"; on the upper right, the deer logo and wordmark {argument name="right brand name" default="luckin coffee"} with smaller Chinese subtitle "专业咖啡新鲜式". Centered beneath the logos, add a huge Chinese headline in thick 3D extruded display typography with white faces, colored edging, heavy shadows, and a glossy embossed look, reading {argument name="headline text" default="蜜雪冰城 × 瑞幸咖啡"}, with the left half accented red and the right half accented blue. Below it, add a second slogan line in bold Chinese text, split by brand color, reading "冰爽甜蜜，咖啡加倍", flanked by short horizontal white dashes. Under that, place a rounded capsule banner in red-to-blue gradient containing the Chinese text "双品牌联名主打・人气招牌同框". In the center foreground, show 2 hero products: on the left, 1 vanilla soft-serve ice cream in a waffle cone, tall swirl, creamy white, slightly glossy, wrapped in a bright red cone sleeve printed with the snowman mascot and Chinese branding; on the right, 1 large clear plastic cup of iced latte or coffee with visible ice cubes, caramel-brown liquid marbling into milk, condensation droplets on the cup, a transparent lid, the blue deer logo, the wordmark "luckin coffee", and small Chinese subtitle text. Surround the cup with dynamic coffee splash arcs and exactly 3 flying coffee beans. Around the lower foreground, add scattered translucent ice cubes and white milk splashes to emphasize cold freshness. Include exactly 2 comic-style promotional burst badges: a red circular badge on the left reading "联名新品" and a blue circular badge on the right reading "限时热卖". In the bottom left corner, add 1 cute 3D snowman mascot character wearing a red cape and holding a tiny ice cream cone, smiling and winking. At the bottom center, place a large red-and-blue beveled ribbon banner with bold white Chinese text reading "今夏限定 立即尝鲜", ending with a yellow lightning bolt icon on the right. Along the very bottom edge, place 3 small selling-point items separated by vertical dividers: a snowflake icon with "冰爽甜蜜", a coffee bean icon with "咖啡加倍", and a heart icon with "双倍满足". Use premium e-commerce poster rendering, ultra-clean product retouching, glossy highlights, rich contrast, crisp Chinese typography, depth, reflections, splash effects, and an energetic summer limited-edition campaign aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张光泽感十足的中式联名饮品广告海报，采用大胆的商业风格，4:5 竖版构图，背景为戏剧性的双色拼接：左侧为明亮饱和的红色，右侧为鲜艳的宝蓝色，中心处融合了放射状光束、动态线条、发光特效以及高能的新品发布灯光。顶部放置 2 个品牌 Logo 区域，中间由一个白色乘号分隔：左上方为雪人吉祥物 Logo，配有中文字样 {argument name="left brand name" default="蜜雪冰城"} 及较小的副标题 "始于 1997 冰淇淋与茶"；右上方为鹿头 Logo 及品牌字样 {argument name="right brand name" default="luckin coffee"}，配有较小的中文副标题 "专业咖啡新鲜式"。在 Logo 下方居中处，添加醒目的 3D 立体加粗中文标题，字体表面为白色，带有彩色边缘、厚重阴影及光泽浮雕感，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="蜜雪冰城 × 瑞幸咖啡"}，左半部分以红色为基调，右半部分以蓝色为基调。下方添加第二行加粗中文标语，按品牌色拆分，内容为 "冰爽甜蜜，咖啡加倍"，两侧饰以短横线。下方放置一个红蓝渐变的圆角胶囊横幅，内含中文 "双品牌联名主打・人气招牌同框"。前景中心展示 2 款主打产品：左侧为 1 个华夫筒香草软冰淇淋，高耸的螺旋状，乳白色，带有微光，包裹在印有雪人吉祥物和中文品牌的亮红色蛋筒套中；右侧为 1 个透明塑料大杯冰拿铁或咖啡，可见冰块、焦糖色液体与牛奶交融的纹理、杯身冷凝水珠、透明杯盖，印有蓝色鹿头 Logo、"luckin coffee" 字样及小型中文副标题。杯子周围环绕动态咖啡溅射弧线及 3 颗飞溅的咖啡豆。前景底部周围添加散落的半透明冰块和白色牛奶溅射，以强调冰爽新鲜感。包含 2 个漫画风格的促销爆炸贴：左侧红色圆形贴纸写有 "联名新品"，右侧蓝色圆形贴纸写有 "限时热卖"。左下角添加 1 个可爱的 3D 雪人吉祥物角色，身披红色斗篷，手持迷你冰淇淋甜筒，面带微笑并眨眼。底部中心放置一个红蓝斜面丝带横幅，带有醒目的白色中文 "今夏限定 立即尝鲜"，右侧末端饰以黄色闪电图标。最底部边缘放置 3 个小型卖点项，由竖线分隔：雪花图标配 "冰爽甜蜜"，咖啡豆图标配 "咖啡加倍"，爱心图标配 "双倍满足"。采用高级电商海报渲染，超洁净产品精修，光泽高光，丰富的对比度，清晰的中文字体，深度感，反射效果，溅射特效，以及充满活力的夏季限定营销美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 中式联名夏季饮品海报：一张极具视觉冲击力的竖版中式冰淇淋与咖啡限时联名广告海报，适用于品牌营销、社交媒体广告及新品发布视觉。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: 3d, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
